source_strategy_meta.strategy_reason: Custom project-specific characters with unique designs; high style specificity (chibi-anime watercolor, DragonBones rig layers). LLM generates base layer sheets; manual DragonBones rigging completes animation.
source_strategy_meta.quality_requirements: Style match: chibi 1:1.5 head-body ratio, watercolor hand-drawn, unique silhouette readable at any resolution
source_strategy_meta.adaptation_requirements: Split into DragonBones bone layers after LLM generation; rig in DragonBones Pro
source_strategy_meta.handoff_requirements: PNG layer sheets + DragonBones .dbproj file per character

source_strategy_meta.adaptation_requirements: Saturation crossfade between states; parallax layer decomposition optional
source_strategy_meta.handoff_requirements: JPG per state per chapter; optional parallax layer PNGs

source_strategy_meta.strategy_reason: Project-specific UI panels and icons with custom wood-sign aesthetic, island palette, and Cocos Creator layout requirements.
source_strategy_meta.quality_requirements: PNG, wood-sign UI style, island palette compliant, atlas-packable
source_strategy_meta.adaptation_requirements: Scale to target size; pack into ui_elements_atlas
source_strategy_meta.handoff_requirements: PNG sprites + ui_elements_atlas JSON

source_strategy_meta.handoff_requirements: PNG sprites + ui_elements_atlas JSON

source_strategy_meta.strategy_reason: UI buttons are project-specific (wood-sign UI paradigm, pill-shape 24px corners, custom palette). No generic UI pack matches healing aesthetic + specific color system.
source_strategy_meta.quality_requirements: PNG, 3-state variants (normal/pressed/disabled), style: flat+soft-shadow wood-sign UI
